# LLM Benchmarks

> Independent, continuously updated measurements of large language model API throughput, time to first token, and reliability. Created by AI engineer David Rose.

Use these pages for factual comparisons of measured LLM API performance. Measurements change over time; cite the model or provider page and include the page's update date when available.

## Benchmark data

- [Cloud LLM benchmarks](https://llm-benchmarks.com/cloud): Compare hosted model APIs by throughput, latency, provider, and recent benchmark runs.
- [Provider status](https://llm-benchmarks.com/status): Current benchmark coverage, model lifecycle state, and data freshness.
- [OpenAI benchmarks](https://llm-benchmarks.com/providers/openai): Current OpenAI model measurements.
- [Anthropic benchmarks](https://llm-benchmarks.com/providers/anthropic): Current Anthropic model measurements.
- [AWS Bedrock benchmarks](https://llm-benchmarks.com/providers/bedrock): Current AWS Bedrock model measurements.
- [Groq benchmarks](https://llm-benchmarks.com/providers/groq): Current Groq model measurements.

## Guides

- [Fastest LLM APIs](https://llm-benchmarks.com/guides/fastest-llm-api): Ranked guidance based on recent measurements.
- [LLM API provider comparison](https://llm-benchmarks.com/guides/llm-provider-comparison): Provider tradeoffs across speed, model access, compliance, and ecosystem fit.
- [Deprecated LLM model replacements](https://llm-benchmarks.com/guides/deprecated-model-replacements): Migration guidance for retired model APIs.

## About

- [David Rose](https://drose.io): Creator and maintainer; AI engineer working on LLM evaluation and agentic systems.
- [Source code](https://github.com/cipher982/llm-benchmarks): Public project repository.
- [XML sitemap](https://llm-benchmarks.com/sitemap.xml): Complete index of provider, model, and guide pages.
